{{CargoRelic
|name=Inman Fluorescent Lamp
|class_id=22419
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=10-02
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Oct 2, 1938 AD, Imman successfully produced the world's first fluorescent lamp.<br>The fluorescent lamp was based on the principles of gas discharge and the use of mercury vapor and a phosphorescent coating to produce visible light. Due to its high brightness and energy efficiency, it quickly became an indispensable household item.
|fame=45
|art=27
|fth=23
|civ=27
|tech=32
|ss1=Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +8<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss2=Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +16<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss3=Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +24<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss4=Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +40<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss7=Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +40<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 400 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill I.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail ATK +20
}}
